review_text: Great Holiday park wuth BBQ Area's & remote controlled gates being closed between Friday afternoon to Monday morning for security & Thieft purposes..

The cabin was very small and very smelly , swower and bathroom rotten skirting boards and dirty,
Bed very smelling very uncomfortable to sleep on it,
Definitely NOT a 4 stars rating,
Never going back.

We stayed for 3 nights in a very cramped cabin. There was a queen size bed tucked up against the wall in the lounge area. Had to push it over so that I had enough room to actually get out of bed. Had maximum 33cm when pushed as far as possible. Unit sleeps 5 but not enough room in the lounge/main bedroom for a family of 5 to be comfortable. The park itself was nice and the staff member who greeted us was lovely. If I had a caravan, I would probably go back, but would not recommend the cabins.
Stayed in our caravan for five nights.  Lovely park, very tidy and walking distance to town centre.

Nice enough park , very central . One thing that I have never experienced in a cabin before was , the shower had very little pressure . So much so that it took forever to rinse shampoo out of your hair . It went from extremely hot to super cold way too quickly . I believe it’s because the shower head is a water saver and it’s so efficient that it stops any decent flow . My wife made the same complaint . 👎
Great location

房間停車皆符合需求
很乾淨
惟浴室沒有洗髮精也沒吹風機
因為床在小廚房旁 烹飪會有油煙困擾
有冷暖氣
營區內有小孩戲水池
Wifi很多人連時會連不上
附近有大賣場和餐廳
離海邊很近 有很多人在海邊旁草坪上做瑜珈
也有人在釣魚
公園很大 有許多遊樂設施
還有水上氣墊遊樂設施

I have just concluded one weeks holiday at Silversands Tourist Park in Lakes Entrance and could not be more pleased with everything, The amenities are immaculate, the staff and grounds crew were most pleasant. Every night I got a wonderful sleep as the place is silent. I will be returning soon.
Sites very small, pump point poor, over crowded

Site was very small compared to all the other caravan parks I’ve been to. But the price is not that cheap. Facilities are okay, swimming pool is quite small and the kitchen is not very well equipped. Also, the light at the kitchen went out at 9pm instead of 10pm as stated on the sign.

Booked a cabin which was meant to be a delux cabin paid $800 for 3 nights cabin was very small struggled to fit my family in staff working very nice but room very expensive for what it was.
For a family cabin main bed should not be in the lounge where kids like watching tv and we had to buy extension leads to get power to the  bunks so the kids could charge things pretty ordinary cabin nice people after booking could not cancel and found a lot cheaper places and better suiting cabins would think a delux cabin would be ok for a family very disappointed would not return any time
Lovely staff. Our cabin was compact but comfortable and clean and the shower was terrific, hot & with great pressure.

4  1/2 stars

Absolute magnificent little private

Just what required
Had everything that was required/requested

Will definitely
Be only place in
Lakes my family and i will recommend family friends /work/ conferences!!

Great park. Came there as a kid love it.  Have not been there for 20 years came back just after Christmas 2022 and it was just as I remember it as a kid. Love your park. Will be back this year.

2025/26 park was sold to a over seas owner who has put in manages. Park has gone backwards. Sites are not moed very offten , toilets cleaded about ones a week. Never much toilet paper and 1/2 the time you bring your own. Manages do not want to work on weekends because they do not get payed to. Over all price has gone up and was told it will go up next year by about $10 a night. Will come back next year but if the service keeps going backwords we will find a new spot. A lot of regles are not going to come back ass it has gone down hill big time.

Walking distance to the beach. Nice management but I could not understand why we have to pay 20 cents for bbq?? The hassle of finding coins was more painful that money worth! One toaster to be replaced too.
Room was not clean at all. Was smelly and bedding was dirty. Reception lady was super rude and she made our stay very unpleasant. Would not recommend. Very very upsetting

Tammy was very helpful we enjoyed our stay thank you! She even helped me with my enquiries on Christmas Day!

Facilities are old but the site is very clean and well maintained! Not a big park but everybody’s quiet at night and respectful! Will definitely come back!

I stayed in a cabin for 1 night.  Whilst dated, it was clean and somewhat small but it matched the advertised photos and my expectations.
The receptionist was friendly and provided advice for meals (dinner and b-fast were great!) and as well accommodated a booking error that I made.
Regarding location, there is some traffic noise from the road (not at night).  The walks to the beach and the coastal walk was pleasant (especially the birdsong in the morning)
I would stay again.

While close to shops and near enough to bridge to the main beach this place is not for families to stay in a cabin. They advertise that the deluxe cabin sleep 5 only because they can supply that amount of beds but dont tell you the bunks are 3 stacked on top of one another with no room to swing a cat. There are no power points in kids rooms at all. The main bed is in the lounge room and the space to sit and eat you may as well sit on the bed! The bathroom is near impossible to use unless you are a child. No space between the toilet and the shower to get proper access to dry yourself or do anything else. They did not supply enough bedding for my kids and make no mention of you needing to supply your own in booking details which I would have if I had known! There is a car space for your car and seating outside the cabin with no covering. We paid $185 a night, would have been better to buy a tent and pay less for better facilities. Seems lots of places now charging massive prices for not much in return. Trying to recoup their losses because of covid but not providing a value for money place to stay. Families stay clear unless you are caravanning or camping.

⭐⭐ – Disappointing stay, not as advertised

Stayed here recently and it didn’t meet expectations. The room was advertised as a family room, but in reality it felt more like a couple-sized space and was quite cramped.

The bathroom was another issue — the shower space was very small, even for an average-sized person. Bedding wasn’t supplied as expected and had to be requested, and even then we didn’t receive enough.

Security was also a concern. The park felt unsecured, with easy access for anyone to walk or drive through.

Overall, the stay didn’t match the description or what we were expecting. A few basics around room size, amenities, and security really need attention.

Can't remember how many times we've been here now, but it's been a few times. We have a Campervan and a favourite site. We always stay for several days, and sometimes up to 10 days (don't understand why people stay just one night - so much to see and do!)

We love the location of this campground - easy walking access to the town, cafes, shops, supermarket, the footbridge and arm and many other things. The amenities are kept well and it is always lovely to see other campervans and caravans there too.  There are cabins as well but lots of sites for caravans and campervans as well. Tammy and Harry are in their first year, having taken over from the previous owners, but I think they're managing very well. Thank you.

Im staying in a campervan,    Caravan park is spotless,  very neat and tidy
Staff are very helpful
Toilets/showers very clean.
Great place
Môi trường rất sạch sẽ và trong lành. Nhà tắm , nhà vệ sinh rất sạch sẽ. Chúng tôi đã có một kỳ nghỉ thật tuyệt vời tại đây. Sẽ quay trở lại 😊

It's not often you experience campground bathrooms as good as this one. The instant you walked into it you felt a bit uplifted! So clean, functional and pleasantly decorated. Lovely lady on reception, too. Thank you.
Sliversands Tourist Park offers affordable accommodation and a really great overall experience. Highly recommended.

Enjoyed a 2 night stay in a super clean, spacious cabin with everything we needed.  (Have never seen such a spotless kitchen sink!) Good location - very close to IGA and walking distance to shops and waterfront.  Staff were super friendly and helpful - assisted with coins for the BBQ and loan of some pegs.  Would definitely stay again!

Rang to change my booking to a day earlier, made an arrangement with the gentleman at reception. When I arrived another employee had no idea what I was talking about and they had booked all rooms. Found somewhere else.

They still charged my card the full fee as “no show”. Unorganised and dishonest.

Loud, disgruntled customer at Reception on arrival was alityle off putting, Managers handled the situation with diplomatic tactfullness. We had an overnight stay in a drive thru powered site $50. Mainly cabins here. Very tidy park, amenities small but very clean. In town centre one street back from the Esplanade, everything within walking distance. Would certainly return.

New management are so incompetent that they are funny, we had an issue with some soiled bed linen and asked for it to be changed
9.am manager agrees once he's done his cleaning,  that's fine
1 pm lady turns up with a new blanket in a bag
3 0m return to cabin nothing has been done,
Clearly they weren't going to change the linen,
We got a 2 night refund, they lost a 30 year customer and just when things couldn't get any more bizarre we see the manager watching us leave so he could go in and re make the bed so they could try to relet the cabin,  !!!!   That's  all we were asking

Sorry but you 2 won't last 6 months

New owners and new managers and price has skyrocketed $55 a night for powered site off peak ( hate to see what the price will be  in season) Will not accept park loyalty discount cards. Ablutions 3showers two toilets in both men and women and can get very crowded during peak period. Some sites very small so ensure you tell manager size of van. Walking distance to beach and a bowling club Pet friendly States free WiFi but could not connect. Usual camp Kitchen small but functional. Small outdoor area for kids. Would I recommend Not at the price. Other caravan parks cheaper with same ammenities

Very good not as clean as I experienced but okay.
Kids have bunckbeds adoults have a queen sized bed a tiny T. V not sony or smart but fine.
For the bunckbeds a staff will bring the sheet and if in need of something go to the reception.
The pool is only open from November to April.
Also raccomend going to Footbridge for fish and chips!
I camped (tent) one night.  Excellent staff assistance. Clean and tidy. Great location. Highly recommended.

Fabulous quiet caravan park with some really nice touches. Heated shower and toilet area, hand dryer that actually works, decent toilet paper, and very friendly hosts. Central to everything in town. Definitely will go back in the future.
Great location, staff are amazing and caring. Rooms have all you need

we stayed here for 3 nights a very neat clean park only small but close to town
the sites are slab and grass and very well maintained.
Robyn the manager assists each camper to their site and is very friendly and helpful
we had a little dog and was able to put up his fence so he had some grass
Lakes entrance, prime location close to everything, neat, tidy caravan park,great facilities and nice owners.
Simply the neatest caravan park I've ever stayed at. Excellent hosts. Everything you need and walking distance to shops and the wharf area. Would give it 6 stars!

It was a nice spot to overnight
We stayed one night with a hired motorhome
Unfortunately it was a little difficult for the host to give us power, they were very efforted to find a solution for us
At the end of the day it was a great spot, clean restrooms, laundry, pools
Recommendable!!!
Sehr gepflegter Campingplatz mit sauberen Sanitäranlagen! Super netter Kontakt, nach telefonischer Rücksprache wurde extra auf uns gewartet für den Check in.

Robyn and Terry work tirelessly and are very successful in keeping their tourist park in perfect condition which well deserves the excellent reviews it receives. Great location in the centre of town, its amenities are without a doubt the best I have seen. The park has several drive through sites and ample park sites, some of which are tight to get into however Robyn expertly talks you in - right onto the wheel pads on first attempt.  She is a whizz.  The area is well grassed and maintained, there is ample space between sites and vehicles park either beside or in front of vans and well out of the way.  Pets are welcome on van sites.
Note - there are some 13 caravan parks in Lakes Entrance many of which are very small and very basic. If you plan on staying, do your homework.

This. Was. Awesome!!! My family and I were stopping on our was back home, and this one was selected out of the collection in the suburb. Firstly, the customer service was extremely polite. We had an oversized caravan and the manager happily upgraded us to a larger site. The pool, while cold, was very relaxing, and you warm up to it eventually. The toilets were ever so clean, and the shower was huge! But the site itself, it was gigantic. It was holding some of the larger caravans available around us.||A few of the other facilities include: playground, laundry, kitchen, picnic area, barbecues and the pool. Oh, and the wifi is faster than a cheetah in roller skates.||Truthfully, I would return in a heartbeat!
Had the owner come and threaten to kick me out because my 4 year old was having a tantrum and wouldn’t go to sleep at 9m. Disgusted and will never return
Sehr freundliche, hilfsbereite Damen! Kleiner, aber feiner Campingplatz, sehr gepflegt alles! Empfehlenswert!

A last minute booking that was accepted straight away. Absolutely lovely owners who offered any assistance needed. Very good facilities (two kitchen areas- microwaves, toaster, stove, bbq, basic utensils, dish washing liquid and tray). Very central location. We paid $40 for 2 adults, had power, water etc and we loved it. Would 100% come again

Stayed at Silver Sands in our van recently and found people who run the park and staff to be very pleasant.(Refreshing)
Rest rooms very clean and immaculate gardens.They have thought of everything.We will be back.Maureen Males

We've been here a dozen times and it is going downhill fast.  It's time for new owners.  I am very unhappy with the cramped parking now. I had to park my car along side the road in front of the cabin and hope that caravans didn't side swipe it.  I didn't like that.  Rather than jam in more cabins, they should be upgrading the ones they have.  We won't be back.
It is wonderfully convenient to everything and it's a joy to take a peel's cruise to the Wyanga Winery for lunch.  That is always a highlight of our stay.

If the parking was still tucked in beside each cabin, we would still be loyal to staying there.  But, no.  It isn't and we won't be.

A wonderful place to stay at Lakes Entrance.  The 2 bedroom unit we stayed in had everything you could ask for - and more. The owner was so caring, friendly and helpful.  Proximity to shops/ beach was fantastic. We loved it
Stayed here a few months ago and have not been to a better caravan park, amazing facilities, friendly service and prime location. 10/10 would recommend

Wir waren für zwei Nächte mit unserem Motorhome hier. Nach der ein bisschen stressigen Ankunft (wir sind mit Freunden gereist und haben nicht alle Fahrzeuge angemeldet), hat dann schliesslich alles geklappt. Es wird hier wert auf eine genaue Reservation im Voraus gelegt.
Unser Aufenthalt war problemlos und schön. Die sanitären Anlagen sind sehr sauber. Der Spielplatz fast nicht nennenswert, doch es gibt einen Pool. Zwei Küchen sind ebenfalls vorhanden, die gerne gebraucht werden können. Alles in allem aber ein sehr gutes Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis.
Der grosse Strand ist via einer Fussgängerbrücke in etwa 15min problemlos zu erreichen.

We booked two nights in our campervan (Mitsubishi express) which has a 270 ⁰  awning . Once set up we had plenty of space to move around. They have a variation of site sizes with everything you need. The amenities are immaculately cleaned and the camp kitchen is well resourced. Every site has their own clothes line, access to water and garbage bins. The property is really well maintained and staff are super friendly and helpful. Very reasonably priced considering all the little extras including pool and spa, function room, table tennis, free wifi and laundry. It is  perfectly presented and so close to the waterways, clubs and shops. Everything you need is in walking distance. ...We'll definately return 🙂
Great park and excellent position in town

Very close to shops, bars, and activities.
The sites are small and the whole park very compact. Two small kitchens with most things you might need. No scourers. 3 small pools and a lot of signs with instructions and regulations.
Very clean.

Great place to stay. Although we are fairly local, we like to bring our caravan here for a bit of R&R. Terry is a great host who guides you into your site. The facilities are always clean and the park is super quiet. Will be going back once school holidays are over.
10 out of 10... We will be back here again & for longer next time. Really nice 2 bedroom unit & ideally setup for wheelchair (Disability) access. Lovely firm beds & plenty of room to fit a large car.
If you are travelling to or through Lakes Entrance, then this is the best place to stay. Great friendly service and the cleanest Park I have ever stayed in.
